variations.name: Ghibli
variations.prompt: Transform the exact scene, people, background, and objects from the reference photo into a classic Studio Ghibli-inspired animated feature film style. Strictly preserve the original background, the original pose, and the exact setting of the original photo. Do not add or change the location. Preserve maximum facial resemblance and identity for every individual. Keep the exact face shape, eye shape, eyebrows, nose shape, lips, jawline, skin tone, hairstyle, facial proportions, age appearance, glasses, and unique facial characteristics. Same people, same poses, same environment, only transformed into a hand-painted animated film style. Authentic Studio Ghibli-inspired aesthetic, traditional Japanese hand-drawn 2D animation, hand-painted watercolor backgrounds, soft cel shading, warm cinematic lighting, clean line art, painterly textures. Warm earth-tone color palette, nostalgic atmosphere, handcrafted animation look. The image should look like a genuine frame from a classic hand-painted animated movie. Facial resemblance and keeping the original background are the highest priorities. Do not alter facial structure. Do not hallucinate new locations or poses. Preserve the original photo's composition perfectly.

variations.name: Disney
variations.prompt: Transform the person in the reference photo into a premium Disney-inspired animated character while preserving maximum facial resemblance and identity.Keep the exact face shape, eye shape, eyebrows, nose shape, lips, jawline, hairstyle, hairline, skin tone, age appearance, and unique facial characteristics from the original photo.The character must remain immediately recognizable as the same person.Same person, same face, same identity, only transformed into a high-end animated movie character.Modern Disney-inspired 3D animated feature film aesthetic, expressive eyes, charming smile, soft facial features, detailed realistic hair, cinematic skin shading, premium character design, feature-film quality rendering, beautiful lighting, soft global illumination, highly detailed textures, realistic fabric materials.If female, transform into a magical princess or adventurous heroine wearing elegant fantasy clothing.If male, transform into a handsome prince, noble adventurer, or heroic royal character wearing detailed fantasy attire.Warm magical atmosphere, glowing particles, enchanted forest, fantasy kingdom, dreamy lighting, magical companions, whimsical storytelling, cinematic composition, masterpiece quality, ultra detailed, professional animation studio quality.Full body character standing naturally, highly detailed clothing, realistic proportions, emotional expression, depth of field, movie poster quality.Facial resemblance is the highest priority. Do not redesign the face. Do not alter facial structure. Preserve identity with maximum accuracy.
